case.title: Organized Retail Theft – Target #1847
case.summary: Organized retail crime ring targeting electronics department. Three suspects identified entering store on multiple occasions, concealing high-value items in foil-lined bags. Total estimated loss exceeds $12,000 across five incidents over two weeks.
case.narrative:
Incident Summary

On March 15, 2026, at approximately 14:22 hours, three subjects entered Target store #1847 located at 8701 Research Blvd, Austin, TX. Subjects were observed by AP associate Sarah Mitchell via CCTV.

Subject 1 (later identified as Marcus Johnson) proceeded to the electronics department and began selecting Apple AirPods Pro and Samsung Galaxy Buds, placing approximately 8 units into a shopping cart. Subject 2 (unidentified female, approx 25-30 years) acted as a lookout near the department entrance. Subject 3 (later identified as Devon Williams) was observed in the parking lot in a silver 2019 Honda Accord (TX plate KJR-4821).

At 14:35, Subject 1 transferred merchandise to a foil-lined reusable shopping bag (booster bag), defeating EAS tags. Subject exited through the garden center emergency exit. All three subjects departed in the Honda Accord heading southbound on Research Blvd.

Loss Details

  • 6x Apple AirPods Pro - $1,494.00
  • 2x Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro - $459.98

Total single-incident loss: $1,953.98

suspects.name: Marcus Johnson
suspects.clothing: Black hoodie, blue jeans, white Nike Air Max
suspects.other_desc: Tattoo on left forearm, small scar above right eyebrow
suspects.notes: Known ORC suspect. Previously identified in incidents at Walmart and Best Buy in the Austin area.

suspects.name: Devon Williams
suspects.other_desc: Drives silver 2019 Honda Accord TX KJR-4821
suspects.notes: Getaway driver. Registered owner of suspect vehicle.

vehicles.description: Four-door sedan, aftermarket window tint, small dent on rear passenger door
vehicles.notes: Registered to Devon Williams. Seen in surveillance at multiple Target locations.

notes.note: AP associate Sarah Mitchell provided CCTV footage from cameras 14, 17, and 22 covering the electronics department, garden center exit, and parking lot.
Cross-referenced Subject 1 description with APD bulletin — matches suspect in ORC ring under investigation by APD Organized Crime Unit.
Vehicle plate KJR-4821 confirmed at three other Target locations in Austin metro area over the past 30 days via LPR data.
Devon Williams arrested during traffic stop on 03/22. Stolen merchandise recovered from vehicle trunk ($1,953.98 in electronics). Booked into Travis County Jail.

evidence.description: CCTV still - Subject 1 selecting merchandise in electronics dept
CCTV still - Subject 1 exiting garden center with booster bag
Parking lot camera - Honda Accord plate capture KJR-4821
APD arrest report for Devon Williams - Traffic stop and merchandise recovery
Photos of recovered merchandise from Williams vehicle
